task.title: Implement graph-backed state machine and reconciliation gateway
task.summary: TASK-050: graph-backed reconciliation state machine and gateway routing implemented.

goal.outcome: CodeWiki can derive alignment state from the graph and recommend the correct loop entry point: feedback, documentation, or implementation.
acceptance: Graph schema includes alignment/state fields for layer nodes and edges
State surface reports reconciliation next action from graph state
Drift classification routes to feedback when intent is missing, documentation when truth must update, implementation when code/tests must change
Reconciliation gateway is documented as controller/gateway, not a fourth compiler
Tests cover at least one downward flow and one upward code-to-doc reconciliation scenario
verification: codewiki_state refresh=true shows healthy graph state

delta.desired: Graph acts as rebuildable state tracker over canonical layers and gateways route into the right compiler loop.
delta.current: Graph indexes nodes/edges but does not yet represent lifecycle/alignment state or reconciliation routing.
delta.closure: Add graph/state fields, routing logic, docs, and tests for state-machine reconciliation.
